# Tara Rose Salons

> Luxury hair salon group, eleven years in the UAE. Four salons across Dubai and Abu
> Dhabi, and a fifth opening in Janabiyah, Bahrain. Founded by Tara Rose Kidd.
> Specialists in blonde, colour correction, and hair health in Gulf climate and water.
> The method is diagnosis-first: we read the hair before we recommend anything.

## Who we are
- **Tara Rose Kidd** — Founder. Eleven years in the UAE. Business Director of the Year three years running, Hall of Fame.
- **Daisy Charlotte Cropper** — Owner, Tara Rose Bahrain. Ten years inside the brand.
- **Branches:** Motor City (Dubai) · Al Quoz (Dubai) · Khalifa City A (Abu Dhabi) · Mamsha al Saadiyat (Abu Dhabi) · Unit 7, District 2, Road 7901, Janabiyah (Bahrain)

## The method
- **Confidence Mapping** — a free diagnosis before the chair. No cost, no obligation. https://www.tararosesalon.com/confidence-mapping
- **The 8-Step Hair Plan** — the in-chair consultation. We read the hair, agree the plan, explain every choice.
- **The Full Loop** — colour, haircut, treatments, home care and maintenance held on one rhythm. Good hair is not one visit.
- **The Confidence Promise** — if something does not feel right within seven days of any colour or treatment service, we invite you back to refine it. Refine, never refund.

## Direct answers
- **Why blonde goes warm** — lightening exposes the gold and orange underneath your natural colour. Toner cancels that warmth and is the first layer to wash out. When the warmth returns the colour did not fail; the toner faded and the canvas is showing through.
- **Why colour fades faster in the Gulf** — heat, hard water and chlorine strip tone faster than a temperate climate does.
- **Why nothing you tried held** — the surface coats with a film from hard water and product, and nothing absorbs through a coated surface. And the right treatment for the wrong need is still the wrong treatment.
- **Why the products you bought did nothing** — they were never matched to what your hair was actually doing.
- **Why a trim never holds** — you were given a length, not a shape. A length is a number; a shape is built for your face and the way your hair falls.

## Education library — the twelve lessons
Each answers one question about why hair behaves the way it does in this climate. Free to read.
- https://www.tararosesalon.com/education/colour-why-blonde-goes-warm — Why your blonde goes warm — lightening exposes the warm gold under your natural colour, and the toner that cancels it washes out first. The warmth returning is the canvas showing through, not colour failure.
- https://www.tararosesalon.com/education/colour-why-brunette-goes-flat — Why your brunette goes flat — a fine film sits over it the way build-up dulls skin, so it cannot reflect the depth underneath. It is coated, not dirty.
- https://www.tararosesalon.com/education/colour-why-colour-fades-faster-here — Why your colour fades faster here — Gulf heat, hard water and chlorine lift colour out faster than a temperate climate, so it fades before it should.
- https://www.tararosesalon.com/education/cut-why-just-a-trim-never-holds — Why a trim never holds — a trim takes off a length; a cut builds a shape for your face and how your hair falls. Without the shape it drops out of place within weeks.
- https://www.tararosesalon.com/education/cut-why-your-cut-grows-out-awkwardly — Why your cut grows out awkwardly — a cut loses its shape as it grows unless it was built for the way your hair actually grows.
- https://www.tararosesalon.com/education/treatments-why-frizz-keeps-coming-back — Why frizz keeps coming back — frizz here is thirst: dry hair pulls moisture from the humid air and lifts. Put the moisture back and it settles.
- https://www.tararosesalon.com/education/treatments-why-nothing-you-tried-held — Why nothing you tried held — the surface was coated with a film from hard water and product, so nothing could absorb, and the right treatment for the wrong need is still wrong.
- https://www.tararosesalon.com/education/treatments-why-treatments-are-not-extras — Why treatments are not extras — treatments are skincare for your hair, the step that lets colour and care actually take. Not an add-on.
- https://www.tararosesalon.com/education/home-care-why-the-products-you-bought-did-nothing — Why the products you bought did nothing — they were never matched to what your hair was actually doing, so they could not hold the result.
- https://www.tararosesalon.com/education/home-care-why-the-shelf-is-not-retail — Why the shelf is not retail — home care is the insurance on your hair, prescribed to your result, not products picked off a shelf.
- https://www.tararosesalon.com/education/whole-woman-why-understanding-changes-everything — Why understanding changes everything — when you understand what your hair is doing and why, the plan stops feeling like a sell and starts making sense.
- https://www.tararosesalon.com/education/whole-woman-why-we-look-after-more-than-the-hair — Why we look after more than the hair — what shows up on the hair often started on the inside, so we read the whole picture, never just the strand.

## The Journal
https://www.tararosesalon.com/blog — eight long-form articles.

## Bahrain
https://www.tararosesalon.com/en/bh — Tara Rose is opening in Janabiyah, Bahrain. The first forty-five women to join come in as founding members.

## In the press
The Bahrain launch was covered by the regional press in July 2026, under the headline "Tara Rose Salon enters Bahrain, bringing its iconic beauty experience and women-first philosophy to a new community."
- Biz Bahrain — https://www.bizbahrain.com/tara-rose-salon-enters-bahrain-bringing-its-iconic-beauty-experience-and-women-first-philosophy-to-a-new-community/
